systemic_low_risk_expansion_equation.strength_term: A_sys_expand = mix(S_expand_score, R_expand, 1 - P_expand, M_brain_direct_v27, R_train_v33)
systemic_low_risk_expansion_equation.learning_term: L_sys_expand = mix(L_expand, S_expand_score, D_feature_v27, B_plastic_v33, R_train_v33)
systemic_low_risk_expansion_equation.system_term: M_sys_expand = A_sys_expand + S_sys_expand + R_sys_expand + L_sys_expand - P_sys_expand

project_readout.summary: systemic low-risk zone expansion validation checks whether the low-risk steady zone starts expanding at the systemic level instead of only inside the previous local shell.
project_readout.next_question: next verify whether this systemic expansion still survives after it is folded into the next brain direct chain and training bridge.
